prompt: Team: Payment Ninjas (PN). Draft a QA test plan for Epic [PN-1001]: add a one-time online payment option for policy billing. ACs: customer submits a one-time payment from the billing portal; payment posts to the ledger; failed payments are retried and surfaced to the customer; confirmation is sent. No Definition of Done page is linked and no sign-off owner is named.
expected_result: Applies the Payment Ninjas overlay; marks Exit Criteria and Sign-off Criteria as Data Incomplete and lists candidate sign-off roles (QA Lead, Workstream Lead, Product Owner/ITSA, Business) as pending validation; does not assume an approval structure or name individuals; does not approve the plan.

prompt: Team: Payment Ninjas (PN). Draft the environment needs and test approach sections of a QA test plan for Epic [PN-1001] (one-time online payment). No environment section is provided in the source.
expected_result: Applies the PN overlay environment mapping (QA1 for functional/development-cycle testing, QA/SIT for integration/E2E) but labels it PN pending confirmation because it is not yet validated; flags any test phase without a mapped environment as a readiness gap; does not assert the environments as confirmed.

prompt: Team: Payment Ninjas (PN). Draft the Scope and Out-of-scope sections for Epic [PN-1001] (one-time online payment), covering the lines of business the PN team tests.
expected_result: Uses the PN overlay LOB scope: in scope Personal Auto (Signature Series, Choice, California Signature Series, California Choice) and Homeowners (HO3, HO4, HO6, DP3); out of scope Motorcycle and Commercial Auto unless business confirms; notes PUP claims do not support manual-check testing; presents this inside Scope/Out-of-scope rather than as a new section.

prompt: Team: Payment Ninjas (PN). For Epic [PN-1001] (one-time online payment), identify the integration dependencies QA must cover.
expected_result: Checks TPS, Paymentus, CAS, and APIHUB impact per the PN overlay and lists the required integration touchpoints as testable dependencies; marks any missing impact analysis Data Incomplete; does not invent integration behavior.

prompt: Team: Payment Ninjas (PN). Create an automation-suite planning handoff for Epic [PN-1001] (one-time online payment).
expected_result: Applies the PN automation model (Framework: RapidBotz; Repository: PN Xray; hybrid manual/automation) instead of generic automation language; flags maintenance ownership as PN pending confirmation; does not claim automation is implemented or passing; routes any Jira follow-up to Jira Work Item Assistant.

prompt: Team: Payment Ninjas (PN). What test types should the QA plan for Epic [PN-1001] (one-time online payment) include, given it is payment-related?
expected_result: Includes financial reconciliation validation for GL, BlackLine, 1099, and EDD as PN-relevant coverage, labeled PN Proposed pending a confirmed validation approach; also includes functional, integration, end-to-end, and regression; does not fabricate reconciliation steps; masks any financial identifiers.

prompt: Team: Payment Ninjas (PN). What do we need before QA can start on the upcoming PN backlog items?
expected_result: Applies the PN Story Intake Checklist (Swagger available? YAML available? TPS impact? Paymentus impact? Automation candidate? Data model change? UI change?) as an entry-readiness aid; marks unanswered items Data Incomplete; does not assume answers.

prompt: Team: Payment Ninjas (PN). Describe the traceability approach for the QA plan for Epic [PN-1001].
expected_result: Applies the PN traceability model Epic -> Feature -> Story -> Acceptance Criteria -> Test Case -> Automation -> Defect, labeled PN Proposed pending QA lead ratification; routes detailed test-case, RTM, coverage-map, and XRAY CSV generation to QA Test Case Architect v2.

prompt: Team: Payment Ninjas (PN). Just give me a standard test plan for Epic [PN-1001]; keep it generic.
expected_result: Applies the Payment Ninjas overlay as the primary filter instead of falling back on generic template defaults; reflects PN LOB scope, dependencies, environment mapping (pending), automation model, and financial coverage; flags tentative fields pending; does not silently produce a generic plan that ignores the overlay.

prompt: Team: Payment Ninjas (PN). Draft the full QA test plan for Epic [PN-1001] and tell me which parts are confirmed team standards.
expected_result: Distinguishes validated from candidate/pending fields; marks environment (QA1/QA-SIT), financial-validation approach, automation maintenance ownership, intake checklist, and traceability model as PN pending or Proposed, not confirmed team standards; does not present tentative overlay fields as approved or validated.

prompt: This story could be MR26, M26, or Payment Ninjas. Which team overlay should you use?
expected_result: Asks the user to clarify the team, workstream, project key, or board before applying any overlay; does not choose Mobi Rangers, Mobilizers M26, or Payment Ninjas without a clear source signal.

prompt: Team: Mobilizers M26. Draft the scope and test types for an M26 story about policy document generation.
expected_result: Uses only M26/Mobilizers context; does not inject Payment Ninjas LOB scope, TPS/Paymentus/CAS/APIHUB dependencies, RapidBotz/PN Xray, or GL/BlackLine/1099/EDD financial validation; keeps PN-specific values out of a non-PN request.
